WE TURN CLEANING PROBLEMS INTO SOLUTIONS

Ready.
Clean.
Proud.

Second Chance Property Solutions provides organized, documented cleaning solutions for apartment unit turns, offices, and events—backed by photo documentation, clear reporting, and a disciplined eight-phase standard.

Management reviewQuality control, correction returns, and approved closeout.

SERVICES

Cleaning operations designed for real properties.

Each job is organized through Second Chance OS so management can review progress, findings, photos, completion status, and billing from one place.

01 · CORE SERVICE

Apartment Unit Turns

Structured cleaning for vacant apartment units, documented through the Secure-first Second Chance Turn Method™.

02 · COMMERCIAL

Office Cleaning

Scheduled cleaning solutions for offices, leasing spaces, common areas, and business environments.

03 · SPECIAL PROJECTS

Event Cleaning

Pre-event, active-event, and post-event cleaning support arranged around the client’s schedule and scope.

LAUNCH PRICING

Clear unit-turn pricing.

All-inclusive cleaning prices are based on unit size. Junk removal is the only separate standard add-on.

Studio$350
1 Bedroom$400
2 Bedroom$500
3 Bedroom$600
4 Bedroom$750
5+ Bedrooms / 2,000+ sq. ft.Quote
Junk removal: up to 2 cubic yards $200; over 2–5 cubic yards $350; over 5–10 cubic yards $550; larger volumes by written quote. Second Chance documents and reports maintenance or repair findings but does not perform repairs.
THE SECOND CHANCE STANDARD™

A documented path from access to delivery.

PHASES 1–2

Secure & Assess

Confirm authorized access and safety first, then document the actual condition and scope.

PHASES 3–4

Prepare & Reveal

Stage tools and supplies, remove loose debris, and expose the unit’s true cleaning needs.

PHASES 5–6

Restore & Detail

Report out-of-scope findings and complete the detailed cleaning work.

PHASES 7–8

Verify & Deliver

Complete quality control, final photos, management approval, and client-ready closeout.

LET’S GET THE UNIT MOVING

Request a written quote.

Share the property, unit size, preferred service date, and junk-removal needs.

Email Second Chance

PREVIEW THE ROLES NOW

Preview mode saves separately on this device. It demonstrates access rules but is not a substitute for cloud security.

Production access uses Supabase Auth and PostgreSQL Row Level Security. Never place a Supabase secret or service-role key in this app.
